result.headline: Soft-landing narrative masking emerging dealer distribution stress and accelerating liquidity drain—auction tape diverging from complacent equity/credit backdrop.
result.thesis: Markets are pricing a Fed-cut scenario with bull-flattened curve (2s10s 49bps, term premium 3bps) and healthy auction surface (composite 10.8 CALM). However, subsurface signals reveal friction: 26W bill tail stress at 60bps, elevated dealer absorption (allocated_at_high_pct 44.66%), and aggressive TGA drain (-$176B in 1 month, 72nd percentile anomaly) indicate primary dealers are front-running a r
result.decisive_call: Reduce duration exposure immediately and position for curve bear-steepening: sell 2s10s (current 49bps, target 70bps+), cover short equity vega, and raise cash allocation ahead of macro pivot confirmation.
key_drivers: TGA drain accelerating (-$176B/mo) signaling pre-positioned liquidity tightening
26W bill auction tail widening (60bps) + elevated dealer take-up masking distribution risk
Bull-flattening curve + compressed term premium front-running Fed-cut narrative not yet confirmed
Macro nowcast weakening (-0.66) while credit/equity remain priced for soft landing
Primary dealer positioning opaque—no new NYFed survey, but auction tape behavior suggests active front-running
key_dissonances: Auction composite CALM (10.8) but 26W tail stress (60bps) + dealer absorption (44.66%) suggests subsurface friction not yet reflected in headline score
Curve flattening + compressed term premium (3bps) vs. macro nowcast slowing (-0.66)—consensus long duration into weakening fundamentals
VIX complacency (15.74) + HY OAS complacency (272bps) vs. TGA drain anomaly (72nd percentile) and dealer distribution stress—equities not pricing liquidity repricing
watch_list: TGA trajectory—next weekly release; drain >$40B weekly would confirm pre-positioning narrative
26W + 52W bill composite—watch for composite score crossing into WATCH territory (≥25) signaling dealer capitulation
Fed communication (next FOMC preview/speaker)—timing of first public pivot narrative confirmation
2s10s curve slope—if compression continues despite macro weakness, signals trapped short-duration positioning
Credit spread blowout trigger—HY OAS 300bps+ would cascade into equity de-risking and liquidity tightening
result.macro_focus: TGA drain (-$176B/mo, 72nd percentile anomaly) + dealer absorption pattern signals primary dealers front-running Fed-cut repricing not yet confirmed by Fed; macro nowcast slowing (-0.66) into flattened curve creates repricing trap.
result.auction_focus: 26W bill tail stress (60bps) + allocated_at_high_pct (44.66%) reveals dealer distribution friction beneath CALM surface; watch for composite crossing 25 (WATCH regime) within 14d.
